description: There are two different fragments bound together under this shelmark. The top one contains the begining of a legal query regarding a court record written in R. Shnuel's court (probably Shemuel b. Hannanya 1139-1159). The bottom fragment seems to be from the end of a letter mentioning Shlomo Halevi b. Yosef.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
